context: The company has no public developer surface. The skill must produce verdict=SKIP with a documented search trail rather than fabricating a low-confidence BUILD candidate. The skip_reason must enumerate the specific probes attempted and what each returned.

checklist.name: Verdict is SKIP
checklist.description: The persisted discovery.json has verdict=SKIP (not BUILD with a low-confidence target, not AMBIGUOUS).

checklist.name: skip_reason enumerates probes
checklist.description: The skip_reason field names specific probes attempted (developer docs portal, OpenAPI spec, official SDKs, official MCP, community MCPs, skill repos, webhooks). Generic 'no public API' without trail is insufficient.

checklist.name: search_attempted populated
checklist.description: The search_attempted array contains at least 4 of the produce-mode probes from the SKILL.md Step 2 minimum set.

checklist.name: would_change_verdict_if populated
checklist.description: The would_change_verdict_if field is non-empty and describes what observable change would flip the verdict (e.g., 'Company publishes a developer portal').

checklist.name: No fabricated skill_targets
checklist.description: skill_targets is empty. The skill did NOT fabricate a low-confidence (<0.5) target as a 'compromise' to avoid SKIP — that violates the honest-SKIP contract.

checklist.name: Validator passes
checklist.description: Running skills/discovery/scripts/validate-output.py against the persisted JSON exits 0.
